case_title: MARK PALMER ET AL VS. RLM DEVELOPMENT LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RLM DEVELOPMENT LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PALMER, MARK PALMER, LOULA AS TO DEFENDANT RLM DEVELOPMENT LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-11-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF MARK PALMER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF LOLA PALMER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RLM DEVELOPMENT LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROBERT MCURN, OWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALMER, MARK PALMER, LOULA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RLM DEVELOPMENT LLC THE PALMERS' CLAIMS ARE BARRED BY ALL APPLICABLE STATUTES OF LIMITATIONS (CCP 339(1) [BREACH OF VERBAL CONTRACT], 338(C) [INJURY TO PROPERTY]. DEFENDANT IS AN UNLICENSED CONTRACTOR AND WOULD ORDINARILY BE REQUIRED TO DISGORGE ALL COMPENSATION (BUS&PROF CODE 7031(B)), BUT FOR THE THREE-YEAR LIMITATIONS PERIOD OF CCP 338(A), 340(A). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALMER, MARK PALMER, LOULA
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-20-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-06-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 99.00 SERVED JUL-13-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RLM DEVELOPMENT LLC
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT RLM DEVELOPMENT LLC
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT RLM DEVELOPMENT LLC
